name: MCLite (MeshCore fork)
label: MCLite — laserir T-Deck/T-Watch MeshCore fork
description: laserir/MCLite — a lean MeshCore-compatible companion firmware for the LilyGo T-Deck Plus and T-Watch Ultra (SX1262 LoRa): encrypted channels, direct messages, GPS share, SOS. Distinct from mainline MeshCore (the separate 'meshcore' profile). Lawful off-grid mesh networking.
note: laserir/MCLite (MIT) — the lean laserir MeshCore FORK for the T-Deck Plus / T-Watch Ultra, DISTINCT from mainline meshcore-dev/MeshCore (its own 'meshcore' profile). v0.4.1 (2026-06-25) ships TWO merged device bins: mclite-v*.bin (T-Deck Plus) and mclite-watch-v*.bin (T-Watch Ultra), each a single web-flasher merged image flashed at 0x0 on esp32s3 + SX1262 LoRa. The label_map ('mclite-watch' vs 'mclite-v', longest_substring) labels the watch and deck images distinctly so neither lands on the wrong device; the default variant prefers the T-Deck (mclite-v) build. Non-.bin assets (mclite_config_tool.html) excluded by the .bin filter. Offset 0x0 pending hardware verification (Stage-5 gate).
